name: Potato, Mushroom and Ham Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups New red potatoes, boiled & quartered
2 cups Cooked ham, cut into 1-inch cubes
Salt and ground pepper to taste
1 cup Grated Fontina or other favorite cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Melt butter in a very hot skillet and sauté potatoes until browned.
3. Reduce heat to medium and add ham; sauté for 1 minute.
4. Heat oil in another medium-hot skillet and add mushrooms; sauté until soft.
5. Season mushrooms with paprika, thyme, cayenne, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
6. Add mushrooms to the ham mixture and toss lightly to combine.
7. Coat a 3-quart casserole dish with vegetable spray and pour the ham-mushroom mixture into the casserole.
8. Beat eggs in a mixing bowl with milk until frothy. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Pour eggs over the ham-mushroom mixture.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
11. Arrange tomato slices around the top and sprinkle with grated cheese.
12. Return casserole to oven and bake until eggs are set, cheese is melted, and top is brown.
13. Sprinkle with parsley.
